Crop Name: seed_onion

Profile
- Season type: long-season (TSUM total=2410 C.d)
- Temperature adaptation: cool-adapted (TBASEM=0.00 C)
- Development driver: temperature + daylength (IDSL=1, DLO=14.00 h)
- Root/water trait: shallow-rooted, more drought-sensitive (RDMCR=60.00 cm, DEPNR=3.00)
- Assimilation trait: lower assimilation potential (AMAX peak=30.00)
- Storage allocation: late storage allocation (FOTB onset DVS=1.27)

Nutrient capacity proxies (leaf maxima)
- NMAXLV: DVS0=0.0600, DVS1=0.0200
- PMAXLV: DVS0=0.0110, DVS1=0.0040
- KMAXLV: DVS0=0.1200, DVS1=0.0400

Use guidance
- Treat this as prior knowledge for zero-shot policy transfer.
- Final action should still adapt to current weather/soil observations.
